queries.question: show me the creators for all documentaries in the category 'Current Affairs'
queries.sql:
SELECT
    Producer.name FROM Producer JOIN Documentary ON Producer.id = Documentary.producer_id JOIN Category ON Documentary.category_id = Category.id WHERE Category.category_name = 'Current Affairs'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?documentary p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?category a :Category .
  ?documentary p:hasCategory ?category .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?category p:category_name ?category_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?category_name_f) = "Current Affairs")
}

queries.question: show me the creators for all documentaries in the category 'Current Affairs'
queries.sql:
SELECT
    Director.name FROM Director JOIN Documentary ON Director.id = Documentary.Director_id JOIN Category ON Documentary.category_id = Category.id WHERE Category.category_name = 'Current Affairs'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?director a :Director .
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?documentary p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?category a :Category .
  ?documentary p:hasCategory ?category .
  ?director p:name ?name .
  ?category p:category_name ?category_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?category_name_f) = "Current Affairs")
}

queries.question: show me the creators for all documentaries in the category 'Current Affairs'
queries.sql:
SELECT
    Producer.name,  Director.name  FROM Producer JOIN Documentary ON Producer.id = Documentary.producer_id JOIN Director ON Documentary.Director_id = Director.id JOIN Category ON Documentary.category_id = Category.id WHERE Category.category_name = 'Current Affairs'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?documentary p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?director a :Director .
  ?documentary p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?category a :Category .
  ?documentary p:hasCategory ?category .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?director p:name ?name2 .
  ?category p:category_name ?category_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?category_name_f) = "Current Affairs")
}

queries.question: What documentaries were released in 2020 and who directed them?
queries.sql: SELECT Director.name, Documentary.title FROM Documentary JOIN Director ON Documentary.Director_id = Director.id WHERE Documentary.release_year = 2020
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title WHERE {
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?director a :Director .
  ?documentary p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?director p:name ?name .
  ?documentary p:title ?title .
  ?documentary p:release_year ?release_year_f .
  FILTER((STR(?release_year_f) = "2020" || STR(?release_year_f) = "2020.0"))
}

queries.question: What documentaries were released in 2020 and who were their producers and directors?
queries.sql: SELECT Producer.name,  Director.name, Documentary.title FROM Documentary JOIN Producer ON Documentary.producer_id = Producer.id JOIN Director ON Documentary.Director_id = Director.id  WHERE Documentary.release_year = 2020
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?title WHERE {
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?documentary p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?director a :Director .
  ?documentary p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?director p:name ?name2 .
  ?documentary p:title ?title .
  ?documentary p:release_year ?release_year_f .
  FILTER((STR(?release_year_f) = "2020" || STR(?release_year_f) = "2020.0"))
}
